title: Notification
contentHtml:
• Cancellation of notification for filling up the Ex-cadre Group ‘B’ post of Protocol Officer in Level-8 in pay matrix of 7th CPC.
  • Extension of last date for submission application in Re-engagement of Retired Railway Staff on contractual basis in Pay Level-7 in (Mechanical) MCF/RBL.
  • Notification for the change of category for Group D (L-1 Employees)
  • Notification for the post of Technician-III in Mechanical Department
  • Calender for the year of 2025
  • Extension of last date for submission application in re-engagement of Retired- railway staff on contractual basis
  • Notification for the re-engagement of retired railway employees
  • Notification for the promotion to the Techinician-III in Mechnical Department
  • Result of Trade Test for promotion to the Tehnician-III in Electrical Department
  • Suitability list for the post of DCMS in Stores Department
  • Suitability list for the post of Tech-I to Sr. Tech. in Mechanical Department.
  • Result of trade test for promotion to the post of Technician-III to Techician-I in Electrical Department
  • Notification for the post of Tecnician-III 50% DPQ in Mechanical Department 
  • Result of trade test for pormotion to the post of Helper to Technician-III in S&T Department
  • Result of trade test for promotion for Technician-III/Fitter to Technician-II/Fitter in Mechanical Department
  • Extention of date of calling of option for TM-IV in Level-1 in Civil Department
  • Result of trade test for promotion from Helper to Technician-III in Electrical Department
  • Notification for TM-IV, Level-I in Civil Engineering Department
  • Result of trade test for promotion from Helper to Technician-III in Mechanical Department
  • Result of trade test for promotion in Technician-III to Technician-II/MCT in Mechanical Department
  • Notification for the promotion from Helper to Technician-III in Mechanical Department
  • Result of trade test for promotion in Technician III in Mechanical Department
  • Suitability list for the post of Helper to Technician III in Mechanical Department
  • Notification for Promotion from Assistant Workshop to Technician in Mechanical Department 
  • Promotion Order of OS other than Stores Department
